testCase.name: Sign-in with valid credentials
testCase.objective: User can Sign in with correct email and password
testCase.precondition: User account exists in the system

testCase.name: Sign-in with invalid mail
testCase.objective: User can't Sign in with incorrect email and password
testCase.precondition: User account exists in the system

step.expectedResult:
"Invalid email format" message is shown
sign in button is inactive

testCase.name: Sign in with empty fields
testCase.objective: error message saying email and password fields are required appear

testCase.name: publishing new event
testCase.objective: Event is created and appears in the event list
testCase.precondition: user must have an Admin role and must be on event management page

step.expectedResult: user is signed in <br data-pasted="true">Home page is displayed
step.testData:
Email: admin@company.com
Password: mimimimi
sign in Button

step.expectedResult: new event creation form is displayed

step.testData:
Event Title:"Cross-Collaboration Project: Demo Day"
Category: "Social"
Event Description: "Frontend, Backend, Test Automation, DevOps, Android, iOS მიმართულებების Cross-Collaboration პროექტის დასკვნით ღონისძიება"
Start Date: "12/26/2025"
End Date: "12/26/2025"
Start Time: "17:00"
End Time: "19:00"
Venue Name: "TBC CONCEPT SPACE"
City: "Tbilisi"
Address: "მარჯანიშვილის ქუჩა 7"
Room Number: "444"
Floor: "IV სართული"
Max Capacity: "404"
Min Participants: "4"

step.expectedResult: Event is created and appears in the event list

testCase.name: canceling while publishing new event
testCase.objective: Event creation is stopped and no new event appears in the event list
testCase.precondition: user must have an Admin role and must be on event management page

step.expectedResult: user is signed in <br data-pasted="true">Home page is displayed
new event creation form is displayed

Event creation is ​stopped
 no new event appears in the event list

testCase.name: registering for an event
testCase.objective: user is successfully registered on chosen event
testCase.precondition:
Use logged in

at least one events exist

step.testData:
Email: hikaru@gmail.com
Password: Testing4
sign in Button

step.expectedResult: capacity is not full (100%)<br data-pasted="true">available spots > 0

Registration Status: Waitlist
Current Waitlist += 1 people
even is marked as registered

testCase.name: registering with taken email
testCase.objective: rejects email that is already registered

step.expectedResult: Validation fails and user is not created<br data-pasted="true">error saying email is already used pops up

testCase.name: canceling event from notifications
testCase.objective: registration on given event is cancelled
testCase.precondition:
user is logged in
user is registered for an event

step.testData:
Email: hikaru@gmail.com
Password: Testing4
sign in Button

step.expectedResult:
registration is cancelled
cancel button changes to register

testCase.name: Capacity updates after event registering
testCase.objective: after new registration, the capacity is updated accordingly
testCase.precondition:
event exists 
user is logged in and on event details page

step.testData: Event Capacity marker

testCase.name: registering for a full event - waitlisted
testCase.objective: user is waitlisted for chosen event
testCase.precondition:
Use logged in

at least one events exist (with waitlist option enabled)

step.testData:
Email: hikaru@gmail.com
Password: Testing4
sign in Button

step.expectedResult:
Registration Status: waitlisted 
event is marked as registered
Current Waitlist+=1 ​

testCase.name: Editing event details - Admin
testCase.objective: modified event is published - changes are visible and present
testCase.precondition:
The user must be logged in as Admin
Event exists

step.expectedResult: user is signed in <br data-pasted="true">Home page is displayed
step.testData:
Email: admin@company.com
Password: mimimimi
sign in Button

step.description: choosing editing option
​changing details
publishing event
step.expectedResult: modified event is published - changes are visible and present

testCase.name: canceling while editing event details - Admin
testCase.objective: modifications, changes are not published. event remains as it was
testCase.precondition:
The user must be logged in as Admin
Event exists

step.expectedResult: user is signed in <br data-pasted="true">Home page is displayed
step.testData:
Email: admin@company.com
Password: mimimimi
sign in Button

step.description: choosing editing option
​changing details

step.expectedResult:
changes are not saved
modified event is not published

testCase.name: registration exports - Admin
testCase.objective: Admin can export registrations and view them in the downloaded CSV
testCase.precondition:
user must have an Admin role 
there must be at least one registration

step.expectedResult: user is signed in <br data-pasted="true">Home page is displayed
step.testData:
Email: admin@company.com
Password: mimimimi
sign in Button

step.description: Navigating to analytics page
View Top Events
step.expectedResult: new event creation form is displayed

step.description: Navigating to Manage event page
export List
step.expectedResult: Event is created and appears in the event list
The CSV contains event data such as names, dates, and other relevant information

testCase.name: Deleting multiple events - Admin
testCase.objective: events marked by admin are deleted and no longer present in event list
testCase.precondition: user must have an Admin role and must be on event management page

step.expectedResult: user is signed in <br data-pasted="true">Home page is displayed
step.testData:
Email: admin@company.com
Password: mimimimi
sign in Button

step.description: mark events to delete
choosing to delete selected events

testCase.name: clearing selection of multiple events - Admin
testCase.objective: events marked by admin (to be deleted) are reverted back to unselected and present in event list
testCase.precondition: user must have an Admin role and must be on event management page

step.expectedResult: user is signed in <br data-pasted="true">Home page is displayed
step.testData:
Email: admin@company.com
Password: mimimimi
sign in Button

step.description: mark events to delete
choosing clear selection
step.expectedResult: events unselected and still present in event list

testCase.name: Getting notification after Event Registration
testCase.objective: confirmation notification is shown with correct content and with correct time
testCase.precondition:
User is logged in
user is on event detail page

step.expectedResult:
Registration Status: Waitlist
Current Waitlist += 1 people
even is marked as registered
A notification should appear confirming successful registration
confirmation notification is shown with correct content and with correct time

testCase.name: Promotion from waitlist on event cancellation
testCase.objective: a user on the waitlist is correctly promoted to a "registered" when someone cancels their registration
testCase.precondition:
user is logged in

there is a full event with waitlist option enabled

step.expectedResult: user is signed in <br data-pasted="true">Home page is displayed
step.testData:
Email: VV@gmail.com
Password: Vvv12345
sign in Button

step.expectedResult:
event is marked as registered
waitlist count increases by 1

customField.name: Description
customField.value: promotion from waitlist to registered status

step.expectedResult:
Current Waitlist -= 1 people
notification: "Spot Available
Great news! You've been moved from waitlist to confirmed for Cooking Class"
